item.title: sdk: v0.111.0
item.description: 0.111.0 (2026-07-10) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.110.0...sdk-v0.111.0 Features api: add support for dreaming (77b28a6) tools: gate session tool calls on evaluatedpermission; bound idle by server stopreason (68a6d7b) Chores docs: small updates to field descriptions (e25b885) docs: update model examp

item.title: sdk: v0.110.0
item.description: 0.110.0 (2026-07-02) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.109.1...sdk-v0.110.0 Features api: add agent-memory-2026-07-22 beta header (a470e10)

item.title: sdk: v0.109.1
item.description: 0.109.1 (2026-07-01) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.109.0...sdk-v0.109.1 Chores api: remove some nonfunctional types from the SDKs (cc4dd4e)

item.title: sdk: v0.109.0
item.description: 0.109.0 (2026-06-30) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.108.0...sdk-v0.109.0 Features api: add support for Managed Agents event delta streaming, agent overrides, reverse pagination, vault credential injection scoping, and agent and deployment webhook events (7f3211b)

item.description: 0.6.0 (2026-06-30) Full Changelog: aws-sdk-v0.5.0...aws-sdk-v0.6.0 Features bedrock: pass client logger to AWS credential provider chain (SDK-90) (29) (9563b4b)

item.title: sdk: v0.108.0
item.description: 0.108.0 (2026-06-30) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.107.0...sdk-v0.108.0 Features api: add support for claude-sonnet-5 (4588db0) Bug Fixes agent-toolset: allow absolute paths that resolve inside workdir (112) (e951fb2) Chores format README.md (176) (98dcff7)

item.title: sdk: v0.107.0
item.description: 0.107.0 (2026-06-29) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.106.0...sdk-v0.107.0 Features api: add support for 20260318 web fetch and support tools (d7057ea) Bug Fixes agent-toolset: bound canonicalize symlink hops; resolve glob matches before confinement check (142) (277be80) types: restore BatchCreateParams.

item.description: 0.106.0 (2026-06-24) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.105.0...sdk-v0.106.0 Features client: add support for system.message streaming events (a7c14b7) Bug Fixes helpers: single source for x-stainless-helper, append semantics, and tag the fallback middleware (107) (106bea0) Chores api: add support for new

item.description: 0.104.0 (2026-06-09) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.103.0...sdk-v0.104.0 Features api: add support for Managed Agents deployments and environment variable credentials (d01e38b)

item.title: sdk: v0.103.0
item.description: 0.103.0 (2026-06-09) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.102.0...sdk-v0.103.0 Features api: add support for claude-mythos-5 and claude-fable-5, with support for server-side fallbacks on refusal (cc337f7) client: adds client-side fallbacks middleware for API providers that do not support server-side fallbacks

item.title: sdk: v0.100.0
item.description: 0.100.0 (2026-05-28) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.99.0...sdk-v0.100.0 Features api: Add support for claude-opus-4-8, mid-conversation system blocks, and usage.outputtokensdetails (bb0bf27) Documentation replace literal newlines (66ba142)

item.title: sdk: v0.99.0
item.description: 0.99.0 (2026-05-27) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.98.1...sdk-v0.99.0 Features support custom file size caps (1029) (814cd4c) Bug Fixes streaming: carry stopdetails through messagedelta accumulation (1027) (198bc27)

item.title: sdk: v0.98.1
item.description: 0.98.1 (2026-05-26) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.98.0...sdk-v0.98.1 Bug Fixes client: preserve directory prefix in skills.versions.create uploads (1024) (abbcd6a) Chores client: swap to using Trusted Publishing (821a50e) examples: rename managed-agents private-sandbox-worker example to self-hosted-sa

item.title: sdk: v0.98.0
item.description: 0.98.0 (2026-05-21) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.97.1...sdk-v0.98.0 Features api: Add support for thinking-token-count beta for estimated tokens in thinking block deltas when streaming (0528d47)

item.title: sdk: v0.97.1
item.description: 0.97.1 (2026-05-19) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.97.0...sdk-v0.97.1 Bug Fixes runner: skip tool calls SessionToolRunner does not own (9987379)

item.title: sdk: v0.97.0
item.description: 0.97.0 (2026-05-19) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.96.0...sdk-v0.97.0 Features client: Add support for self-hosted sandboxes in CMA with sandbox helpers (659a343) Bug Fixes typescript: upgrade tsc-multi so that it works with Node 26 (623f71c) Chores tests: remove redundant File import (cf821fc)

item.title: sdk: v0.96.0
item.description: 0.96.0 (2026-05-13) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.95.2...sdk-v0.96.0 Features api: Add BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultBlock types (08f02f3) api: Add support for cache diagnostics beta (eafbd6d) Bug Fixes zod: ensure only zod/v4 types are used (992) (9e08bcc) Chores api: spec updates (27d64ef)

item.description: 0.95.1 (2026-05-07) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.95.0...sdk-v0.95.1 Chores redact api-key headers in debug logs (fad8fee)

item.description: 0.95.0 (2026-05-06) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.94.0...sdk-v0.95.0 Features api: add support for Managed Agents multiagents and outcomes, webhooks, vault validation (e0c0e9b) Bug Fixes api: Adjust webhook configuration (deed3f6)

item.description: 0.94.0 (2026-05-05) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.93.0...sdk-v0.94.0 Features client: allow targeting a workspace for OIDC federation token exchange (bde6620)
